use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MILDLY TO MODERATELY ACTIVE ULCERATIVE COLITIS IN MALE PATIENTS

indications.text:
GIAZO is indicated for the treatment of mildly to moderately active ulcerative colitis in male patients 18 years of age and
older.
Limitations of Use:
• Effectiveness of GIAZO in the treatment of female patients was not demonstrated in clinical trials [see Clinical Trials
(14.1)].
• Safety and effec...
